services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Weekly mowing, edging, and trimming to keep your grass healthy and looking sharp.

services.title: Landscape Installation
services.description: New plantings, garden beds, and hardscape features designed for Georgia's climate.

services.description: Spring prep, fall leaf removal, and winter protection for your plants and lawn.

services.title: Irrigation & Drainage
services.description: Sprinkler installation, repair, and drainage solutions to protect your investment.

about.heading: Four Seasons, One Team
about.body: We're a Macon landscaping crew that understands Georgia's weather. Every season brings different challenges — we're ready for all of them.
